subcodes.first_line: My Most Exalted Pen beareth witness that thou hast quaffed the choice wine of divine knowledge from the hands of thy Lord, the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد قلمی الاعلی بانک شربت رحیق العرفان من ایادی ربک الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
